vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the visual evidence. P1, P2, P3, and P4 are not identifiable as living specimens in the provided sequence. The pots appear to contain only soil and debris.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: White rabbit anchor present, but no Pothos visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no String of Nickels detected.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no Mexican Mint detected.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit figurine present in soil; no Pothos foliage detected.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no Silver Guest detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, damp-appearing substrate across all pots. No signs of active growth or germination.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of crushed eggshells in the foreground pot (P3/P4 area).
biome_observations.surface_anomalies: Total absence of biological plant structures in all monitored containers.

temporal_deltas.EARLIEST_to_T-2: Static state; no growth or change observed in soil or debris.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Total loss of visual data (black frames), indicating a failure of the monitoring apparatus or lighting system.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. There is no evidence of the registered plants. The environment appears to be a collection of empty pots containing only soil and decorative debris.
anomalies: Crushed eggshells used as soil amendment/top dressing.
Total visual blackout in final two frames.
Complete absence of expected botanical specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a critical failure in the biome. From the earliest image, the pots are devoid of the expected botanical life (P1-P4). The presence of the white rabbit anchor in an empty pot confirms the location but highlights the absence of the Pothos. The final two images provide no data, suggesting a hardware or lighting failure. The environment is currently a sterile soil-based setup with no active plant growth.
